childhood.familyBackground: Entrepreneur with family background in food and agriculture. Built agricultural empire from small operations.
childhood.familyBackgroundKo: 식품 및 농업 가족 배경의 기업가. 소규모 운영에서 농업 제국 구축
childhood.earlyLife: Grew up during post-war American expansion. Exposed to food and agriculture early. Passionate about farming.
childhood.earlyLifeKo: 전후 미국 확장 중 성장. 식품 및 농업에 조기 노출. 농업에 열정적

careerTimeline.event: Expanded into produce distribution and branding
Built major fruit and nut agricultural operations
careerTimeline.eventKo: 주요 과일 및 견과류 농업 운영 구축

careerTimeline.event: Became California's largest private agriculture company
careerTimeline.eventKo: 캘리포니아 최대 개인 농업 회사가 됨

failures.description: Drought and weather patterns impacted agricultural yields
failures.descriptionKo: 가뭄 및 날씨 패턴이 농업 수확량에 영향

quotes.text: Agriculture is feeding the world and building futures

personalTraits.knownFor: Building world's largest agricultural brand portfolio
personalTraits.knownForKo: 세계 최대 농업 브랜드 포트폴리오 구축
personalTraits.philanthropy: Supports environmental conservation and food security
personalTraits.philanthropyKo: 환경 보호 및 식량 보안을 지원
